creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Under aout world, devel/glib11-devel must make ${PREFIX}/lib/libglib11d.so.2.1.
But it makes libglib11d.so..2.1.
                          ^^^^^^!

Fix: 

I don't know.
But I think patches/patch-aa has probrem.

-freebsd2* | freebsd3*)
+freebsd2*)
   version_type=sunos
-  library_names_spec='${libname}${release}.so$versuffix $libname.so'
+  library_names_spec='${libname}${release}.so.$versuffix $libname.so'
                                           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ here ???
